Platform

Nexus modules

Start with operations;
add growth later.

Messenger Hub

Every channel. One queue.

  • Unified WhatsApp, Facebook & Instagram inbox with full customer profile
  • Assign conversations, track SLAs, close faster
  • One click to launch a campaign from any conversation
AI-powered

AI Signal Layer

Every message read. Every risk flagged. Before your team even opens the inbox.

  • Churn risk, wrong promises, sentiment & intent — auto-tagged
  • Live risk alerts with confidence scores
  • Arabic & English, across all channels

Warehouse & Pick-Pack

Pick faster. Ship right.

  • Create pick lists, scan barcodes, avoid mispicks
  • Print packing slips & labels in one click
  • Real-time shortage alerts

Automations

Connect anything. Trigger everything.

  • Scrapers, flows, webhooks — ready to deploy
  • Trigger ops or messages from any event
  • Native connectors for Shopify, Woo, carriers & Issabel

Customers 2.0

Know your buyers before they churn.

  • RFM scoring, churn risk, and LTV — automated
  • Smart segments ready to message in one click
  • Cohort analysis and product bundle insights

Growth

Campaigns that convert.

  • WhatsApp, Email & SMS from one campaign builder
  • Track conversions and repeat purchase rates
  • Actionable dashboards — no analyst required

Experience the platform

Process

Go live in a week

Three steps. No long onboarding. No professional services.

01

Connect

Link your Shopify or WooCommerce store and WhatsApp Business number. Under an hour, no engineers needed.

02

Operate

Run daily pick-pack, handle customer messages, and watch AI surface risks — before they reach your inbox.

03

Grow

Launch campaigns to at-risk segments, analyze cohort behavior, and repeat what works.

Arabic UI 1 store on Free Issabel & carriers on Pro Go live in a week

For AI agents

Built for humans.
Discoverable by AI.

Nexus publishes machine-readable APIs, OpenAPI specs, and llms.txt so AI agents can discover, understand, and operate your business on your behalf.

OpenAPI 3.1 spec

Full machine-readable contract for all Nexus resources.

openapi.yaml →

llms.txt discovery

Standardised capability manifest for agent discovery.

llms.txt →

Agent auth via API keys

Scoped keys with CRUD access to contacts, orders & messages.

Pricing

Simple pricing

Start on Free for operations. Upgrade to Pro when you're ready for CRM, campaigns, and analytics.

Free

Operations, solved.

$0 /mo
Start free
  • 1 store: Shopify or WooCommerce
  • Order import & Pick-Pack dashboard
  • Print pick lists & packing slips
  • Basic customer sync
  • Up to 30 orders/day
  • New order notifications
  • CSV export
MOST POPULAR

Pro

CRM, campaigns & analytics.

$79 /mo
Upgrade to Pro
  • Unlimited orders
  • Multiple stores (Shopify & WooCommerce)
  • Advanced CRM: RFM, churn risk, LTV
  • Campaign builder (Email / WhatsApp / SMS)
  • Smart segments & automation
  • Team roles & collaboration
  • Issabel, WhatsApp, carrier integrations
  • Cohorts, bundles, margin analytics

Enterprise

Security, scale & support.

Let's talk
Contact sales
  • White-label & custom branding
  • SSO/SAML, audit logs, DPA
  • API & webhooks with rate limits
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • 99.9% SLA & priority support

Prices in USD. Taxes may apply. Messaging (SMS/WhatsApp) billed separately.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What is Nexus?

Nexus is a multi-tenant operations OS for e-commerce SMEs. It unifies orders, inventory, WhatsApp messaging, CRM, shipping, and AI analytics in one platform — built for teams in Egypt and MENA.

How long does setup take?

Basic setup takes under an hour. Connect your Shopify or WooCommerce store, link WhatsApp Business, and you're operational. Full configuration with custom workflows may take a few days.

Does Nexus support Arabic?

Yes. Full Arabic UI with RTL layout. Notifications, AI features, and campaign content all support Arabic-first workflows.

What integrations are available?

WhatsApp Business API, Facebook, Instagram, Shopify, WooCommerce, Bosta (courier), Issabel PBX, and n8n for custom automation workflows.

Is my data secure?

Data is isolated per organization using PostgreSQL Row-Level Security — encrypted in transit and at rest. Each tenant's data is completely invisible to others.

Can AI agents use Nexus?

Yes. Nexus publishes an OpenAPI spec, llms.txt, and supports API key auth for autonomous AI agents. See our docs for details.
